name: Pineapple Chutney
recipeIngredient: 2 medium yellow banana peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, combine all ingredients.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 1 to 1-1/2 hours or until the chutney reaches the desired thickness.
4. Refrigerate.
5. Serve with meat or as an appetizer spread over cream cheese.
